attacking_style: Deploys long-range attacks (13+ km) on flat to rolling stages to disrupt sprint trains, not primarily seeking stage wins but creating tactical chaos for opponents.
team_tactics: Functions as aggressive disruptor rather than protected leader; forces rivals to expend domestique resources chasing down extended efforts before key moments.
terrain_preference: Time trials remain competitive terrain but showing decline from peak world champion form. Most effective on flat breakaway stages where TT engine sustains long efforts.
vulnerability: Pacing judgment in time trials appears inconsistent - fades in final 5km despite leading at intermediate checks. Crash-prone in Grand Tour positioning. Declining TTT and overall TT performance from 2017-2019.
key_patterns: Loses time in final kilometers of time trials despite strong intermediate splits (2 instances)
Consistently underperforms expectations as former world TT champion, losing 12-25s to top rivals (3 instances)
Uses long breakaways 13+ km to tactically disrupt sprint teams, not win stages (1 clear instance)
Crash liability creates team tactical deficits in Grand Tours (1 instance, pattern unclear)
Form timing misalignment with peak events despite world champion pedigree (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: Clear decline from world champion TT dominance through 2017-2019. Struggles with pacing, crashes, and rejoining efforts in closing kilometers suggest fading top-end form.
